title: AL's Dinosaurs
description: A pack that adds Dinosaurs to Minecraft!
body:
![AL's Dinosaurs logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/989e3ab371f7cda0c51e33b6ceaeb379117edd3e.png)

# 

A pack that replaces the Ravager and Sniffer with Dinosaurs!
This is a speculative biology project where dinosaurs would fill the role of existing Minecraft mobs. A lot of consideration went into deciding which mobs to turn into dinosaurs, which is why I limited the pack to these two and didn't just haphazardly make random mobs dinosaurs like most what people would do.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/JiUzzBToxoE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

I also didn't want to use real species because I don't want to misrepresent the real animals so I created fictional ones that are still based on reality!

Breif "lore" descriptions of each Dinosaur:

 

"Vastatoceratops"

Name meaning the "ravager horned face", the Vastatoceratops is a fictional genus of centrosaurine ceratopsian uncovered by the Illagers through ancient eggs. Now serving as a powerful beast, assisting in their Raids...

 

"Olfactopelta"

Name meaning "sniffing shield", the Olfactopelta is a fictional genus of nodosaurid ankylosaur once domesticated by the ancient Villagers that populated what are now the ocean ruins. Now the only way to find them is by uncovering ancient eggs from the sands of those sunken structures...
